full_text:
Chen Shi 陳式
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Shi (陳式). Rumored father of Chen Shou. Traded for Xiahou Shang at Hanzhong. Executed. Chen Shi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Chen Shi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
